title: No Screen Bobbing
description: Disables the screen shake present when view bobbing is enabled
body:
Minecraft's view bobbing feature does two things: It shakes the screen during gameplay (aka view/screen/world bobbing; most noticeable when in thirdperson) and also moves the hand (hand bobbing). This mod removes screen bobbing while preserving hand bobbing. I personally use this because I'd like my crosshair to stay static for speedbridging but like the bobbing hand and viewmodel. 

This is a client-side mod and has no dependencies.
